title: cynoglossum wallichii
intro: Cynoglossum wallichii, also known as the Himalayan forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum wallichii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
